title: Dott & Keyy Vitamin C Face Serum, 10% Vitamin C + E, 5% Niacinamide, Super Bright Skin, 1 fl.oz
description: Transform your skincare routine with this powerful Vitamin C face serum. Formulated with 10% Vitamin C and Vitamin E, this serum helps brighten your complexion while 5% Niacinamide works to improve skin texture and tone. The 1 fl.oz bottle contains a concentrated blend of active ingredients that target dullness and uneven skin tone. This facial serum from Dott & Keyy delivers potent antioxidants directly to your skin, helping to enhance its natural radiance. Perfect for daily use, this serum can be incorporated into both morning and evening skincare routines. The lightweight formula absorbs quickly without leaving any sticky residue, making it ideal for layering with other skincare products. Experience the brightening benefits of this advanced serum formulation that combines proven ingredients to help reveal your skin's natural luminosity.
